mapper.sql: select s.seller_id, s.seller_no, s.seller_code, s.seller_name, s.seller_short_name, s.seller_type, s.seller_level, s.status, owner_link.user_name as username, s.legal_id, s.business_license_no, s.country_code, s.state_province, s.city, s.postal_code, s.address_line1, s.address_line2, s.contact_name, s.contact_phone, s.contact_email, s.attachment_file_name, s.attachment_mime_type, s.attachment_size_bytes, s.attachment_file_url, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark, coalesce(account_stat.account_count, 0) as account_count, owner_link.last_login_time as last_login_time, cast(0.00 as decimal(18,2)) as account_balance, 'USD' as balance_currency

left join seller_account owner_link on owner_link.seller_id = s.seller_id and owner_link.account_role = 'OWNER' and owner_link.seller_account_id = ( select min(owner_pick.seller_account_id) from seller_account owner_pick where owner_pick.seller_id = s.seller_id and owner_pick.account_role = 'OWNER' ) left join ( select seller_id, count(*) as account_count from seller_account group by seller_id ) account_stat on account_stat.seller_id = s.seller_id
mapper.select:
from seller s
where 1 = 1
and s.seller_no like concat('%', #{sellerNo}, '%')
and s.seller_code like concat('%', #{sellerCode}, '%')
and s.seller_name like concat('%', #{sellerName}, '%')
and s.seller_name like concat('%', #{companyName}, '%')
and s.seller_short_name like concat('%', #{sellerShortName}, '%')
and owner_link.user_name like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and s.seller_level = #{sellerLevel}
and s.status = #{status}
and s.contact_phone like concat('%', #{contactPhone}, '%')
and s.country_code = #{countryCode}
and s.state_province like concat('%', #{stateProvince}, '%')
and s.city like concat('%', #{city}, '%')
and date_format(s.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.createBeginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(s.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.createEndTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(owner_link.last_login_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.lastLoginBeginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(owner_link.last_login_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.lastLoginEndTime},'%Y%m%d')
and cast(0.00 as decimal(18,2)) >= cast(#{params.balanceMin} as decimal(18,2))
and cast(0.00 as decimal(18,2)) <= cast(#{params.balanceMax} as decimal(18,2))
order by s.create_time desc, s.seller_id desc
select max(seller_no) from seller where seller_no like concat(#{sellerNoPrefix}, '%') and length(seller_no) = 9
mapper.insert: insert into seller( seller_no, seller_code, seller_name, seller_short_name, seller_type, seller_level, status, legal_id, business_license_no, country_code, state_province, city, postal_code, address_line1, address_line2, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, attachment_file_name, attachment_mime_type, attachment_size_bytes, attachment_file_url, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{sellerNo}, #{sellerCode}, #{sellerName}, #{sellerShortName}, #{sellerType}, #{sellerLevel}, #{status}, #{legalId}, #{businessLicenseNo}, #{countryCode}, #{stateProvince}, #{city}, #{postalCode}, #{addressLine1}, #{addressLine2}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{attachmentFileName}, #{attachmentMimeType}, #{attachmentSizeBytes}, #{attachmentFileUrl}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update seller set seller_code = #{sellerCode}, seller_name = #{sellerName}, seller_short_name = #{sellerShortName}, seller_type = #{sellerType}, seller_level = #{sellerLevel}, status = #{status}, legal_id = #{legalId}, business_license_no = #{businessLicenseNo}, country_code = #{countryCode}, state_province = #{stateProvince}, city = #{city}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, address_line1 = #{addressLine1}, address_line2 = #{addressLine2}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, attachment_file_name = #{attachmentFileName}, attachment_mime_type = #{attachmentMimeType}, attachment_size_bytes = #{attachmentSizeBytes}, attachment_file_url = #{attachmentFileUrl}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where seller_id = #{sellerId}
update seller set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where seller_id = #{sellerId}
mapper.select: select a.seller_account_id, a.seller_id, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.account_role, a.status, a.status as user_status, a.user_name, a.nick_name, a.email, a.phonenumber, a.last_login_ip, a.last_login_time, a.pwd_update_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from seller_account a left join seller_dept d on d.seller_dept_id = a.dept_id and d.seller_id = a.seller_id and d.del_flag = '0' where a.seller_id = #{sellerId} order by a.create_time desc, a.seller_account_id desc

select a.seller_account_id, a.seller_id, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.account_role, a.status, a.status as user_status, a.user_name, a.nick_name, a.password, a.email, a.phonenumber, a.last_login_ip, a.last_login_time, a.pwd_update_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from seller_account a left join seller_dept d on d.seller_dept_id = a.dept_id and d.seller_id = a.seller_id and d.del_flag = '0' where a.seller_account_id = #{sellerAccountId} limit 1

select a.seller_account_id, a.seller_id, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.account_role, a.status, a.status as user_status, a.user_name, a.nick_name, a.password, a.email, a.phonenumber, a.last_login_ip, a.last_login_time, a.pwd_update_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from seller_account a left join seller_dept d on d.seller_dept_id = a.dept_id and d.seller_id = a.seller_id and d.del_flag = '0' where a.user_name = #{userName} limit 1

select a.seller_account_id, a.seller_id, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.account_role, a.status, a.status as user_status, a.user_name, a.nick_name, a.email, a.phonenumber, a.last_login_ip, a.last_login_time, a.pwd_update_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from seller_account a left join seller_dept d on d.seller_dept_id = a.dept_id and d.seller_id = a.seller_id and d.del_flag = '0' where a.seller_id = #{sellerId} and a.account_role = 'OWNER' order by a.seller_account_id asc limit 1
mapper.update: update seller_account set nick_name = #{nickName}, dept_id = #{deptId}, email = #{email}, phonenumber = #{phonenumber}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where seller_account_id = #{sellerAccountId}
update seller_account set password = #{password}, pwd_update_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where seller_account_id = #{sellerAccountId}
update seller_account set last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, update_time = sysdate() where seller_account_id = #{sellerAccountId}
mapper.select:
select token_id from seller_session where seller_id = #{sellerId} and status = '0' and logout_time is null and expire_time >= sysdate()
and seller_account_id = #{sellerAccountId}
mapper.update:
update seller_session set status = '1', logout_time = sysdate() where seller_id = #{sellerId} and status = '0' and logout_time is null and expire_time >= sysdate()
and seller_account_id = #{sellerAccountId}
